entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing @AlexanderRother. But documentation does not apply for my 2023 On Premise System, because the Apps "Communication System" and "Communication Arrangement" don't exist. Neither the SAP Note 3513374 helped me getting these Apps. So am I missing something or is there any new ABAP AI SDK documentation incoming for lower Onprem/Private Release? Because it is stated: "Lower releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and OnPrem are supported via Transport-based Correction Instructions (TCI)"

Thanks in advanced.

Wang

entry.title: Re: Publish the terminated employees in worksheet to EC
entry.content: Hi @vivekanandanp Product team will fix this in 1H 2025.

entry.title: Re: SAP Investment Management Future State
entry.content:
Please review SAP Note: 2436714 - Investment Management in SAP S/4HANA, private cloud and on-premise edition.

IM isn't being sunsetted, so if it meets your business requirements you can continue to use it.

entry.title: Script giving error about screen mismatch in ME21
entry.content:
I'm working to write a script for ME21, which will take Contract information, and use it to create a Purchase Order.

While testing, I always get the same error "No batch input data found for dynpro (SAPMSSY0 0120) SAPMM06E 0101 .   expected." - it is expecting the Purchase Order creation screen, but is still stuck on the Contract line item selection screen. When I view it screen by screen, the script does GO to SAPMM06E 0101, but it stops because it THINKS that it is on SAPMSSY0 0120. 

Is there any way to make the visible screen match the screen listed in the background?

entry.title: Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?
entry.content:
Hello SAP

 

Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?

 

SLT version is "SAP LT REPLICATION SERVER 3.0" which is running on NetWeaver 7.52 SP 12 with Linux OS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT w...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

As per KBA 3574158 - Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?

Answer is:

No.

SLT can only support databases that are supported by SAP NetWeaver for either source or target database connections.

This limitation is due to DBSL.

 

When using a DB connection to the target system, the compatibility of SLT with the target system is based on whether its DBSL version supports the target DB version. More information about this in 2737003 - SAP Landscape Transformation Replication Server (SLT): Non ABAP-based Targets.



According to Product Availability Matrix, MSSQL is not compatible with OS Linux. As you can check in the following link https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3Dnetweaver%26filter%3D%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D73554900100900000414%26pt%3Dt%257CPLTFRM%26ainstnr%3D73554900104900001064%26fclfilter%3DG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520X86_64%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520POWER%2520BIG%2520ENDIAN%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520FOR%2520ZSERIES%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520POWER%2520LITTLE%2520ENDIAN

SAP Support Launchpad: Sign In you can search for the Netweaver version and check the DBs compatibility in this link https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap(bD1lbiZjPTAwMQ==)/support/pam/pam.html#ts=2
click in "display all product versions" -> search for the NetWeaver version you wanna know -> Technical release information -> database platforms

entry.title: Re: Error FWM 02021 Using SAP Business Objects 4.3
entry.content:
Hi. did you obtain information about the issue?

we start to see a same problem with same version/SP, some functions like "save as" for webi reports keep on hold without response in some particular moments

entry.title: How to install and configure the Salesforce adapter in SAP SDI?
entry.content:
How to install and configure the Salesforce adapter in SAP SDI?

Is there a SAP Note available to help us through this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to install and configure the Salesforce adapter i...
entry.content:
SDI does not have a standard Salesforce adapter.

However, this is available to be purchased through a third party company.

Please refer to the page below:

https://store.sap.com/dcp/en/product/display-2001010822_live_v1/salesforce-adapter-for-sap-hana-smart-data-integration

The third party will be responsible for supporting this adapter, as well as steps on how to install and/or configure it.

In case of any questions, please contact your Account Owner as they should be able to guide you more efficiently in matters of purchases.

entry.title: Managing Multiple Material Numbers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public
entry.content:
I am working on an SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public implementation project and have the following scenario:

My client needs to manage a single material with three different material numbers. In their current process, they use both internal and external numbering simultaneously for materials. Specifically, they have an internal material number that groups different external material numbers from suppliers for the same material.

Example:

  • Material: Finished Product
  • Internal Material Number: 1
  • External Material Number from Supplier 1: SKU001
  • External Material Number from Supplier 2: SKU002

When creating purchase orders, buyers are used to requesting materials using the supplier’s external material number (SKU001 or SKU002), and reports and analytics are also based on this external numbering. However, suppliers frequently change their SKUs, even though the material itself remains the same.

Given this scenario, what options are available in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public to manage multiple material numbers while maintaining material traceability? 

I appreciate any guidance on how to handle this requirement in the system.

entry.title: Re: RAP On-Stack Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Hello Pavan,

It was already helpful, thank you.

I have checked both the R_SalesOrderItemTP and R_SalesOrderTP CDS views, and I noticed that 'allowNewCompositions: true' is missing in the extensibility section. Does this mean we cannot add new nodes?

entry.title: Re: Can ABAP CDS views have columns with data type BLOB t...
entry.content: We managed to design the basic and composite views without any error. In the final consumption view we got error. The field name is BMP and it has image BLOB column. We removed this column and got the CDS view to work successfully.

entry.title: Re: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content: isn't it possible to use a sub-select ?

entry.title: How to Export/Import Role Based Permissions and Groups
entry.content: RBP Roles and Groups are different in our lower environments to production for testing purposes. The issue I face is that when we refresh a lower environment from Production the roles and groups are overwritten and I need to recreate them, which is time consuming. Is there a way to export from one environment and import to another?

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am not exactly sure how it can be implemented in ABAP, but you may try to use the concepts of hash values (SHA-265 or MD5). I had a similar requirement in the non-abap world where I needed to move a file between the systems and programmatically check if the file and its content were identical and unaltered/corrupted. So I extracted the hash value of the file at the source and compared it with the file received at the destination and if the hash value is exactly the same, the file is considered as same and no changes in the content. 


So in your scenario instead of the content in the file, you may rely on the hash value of the file and the file properties like name, time etc for the comparison every time a new file is received.  

Regards

Virinchy

entry.title: Re: How to consume RAP entity from other ABAP System?
entry.content: You may expose it as an OData service and set up a destination between the two systems to securely access the exposed OData service in the other system from which you would like to access it.

entry.title: NCo 3.1.5.0 System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could not load file or assembly
entry.content:
Hello SAP gurus,

  1. I am trying to test the new nco connector for .NET 8 but I am finding a few issues.

The error I am seeing is System.IO.FileNotFoundException: 'Could not load file or assembly 'C:\Users\xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx\source\repos\MinimalNcoConsole\bin\x64\Debug\net8.0\sapnco_utils.dll'. The specified module could not be found.'

 

I went down a rabbit hole of validating step by step:

1. File actually exists

 

2. The right architecture and runtimes are targeted (.NET 8 - x64):

 

3. The C++ distributions are up to date

This is a Proof of concept console just to test if it would connect, Has anyone had a similar issue?

Are there specific dependencies that I need to take into account outside of the C++ packages?

Thank you in advance for any help you could provide!

S

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Thank you, I can't relay on the file name because its always the same, they are not adding the time stamp in file name or any other unique ID in the file name

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: @vihaan2018 To be precise, you rely on the file content to generate the hash values, not the file metadata properties. So as long as the content in the file is different the hash values will be different. you can rely on the hash values, store them in a ztable and compare it.

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Thank you, I found one FM CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_CHAR but its for strings, let me google more on your suggestion (get hash value of a file? If anybody aware of it pls. help us)

entry.title: Re: NCo 3.1.5.0 System.IO.FileNotFoundException: Could no...
entry.content: I was missing ijwhost.dll pasted in the folder. If it is not present, it will say that is missing sapnco_utils.dll . This is solved now.

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Oh, you mean, I need to get the hash value of file content (the data)? If so, as you know in SAP we have length limitation for string datatype, the FM CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_CHAR string to pass it to generate the hash

entry.title: Re: Tracking of CO2 emissions in SAP
entry.content:
What I meant is - put CF data to SFM (flat file or other possible integration) and integrate it with ERP like with S/4 here (I. knoowe there might be some differences but with Integration Suite on BTP should not be a problem -->  https://help.sap.com/docs/sustainability-footprint-management/integration-guide-ebb022d8ed1d462a9379770a5cf4e140/connecting-to-sap-s-4hana?locale=en-US

This video more or less shows this process between SFM and S/4HANA PR.  https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_cg6vmdjv

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: I just did a bit of research ,  you can see if 'CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_RAW' or 'CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_CHAR' would help

entry.title: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I have installed SAP Mobile Start on Mobile.

I would like to connect to my SAP Fiori system to approve purchase requistion, purchase order etc .abap

First screen asking to scan QR code.

How to start pls?

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Thank you, I am not sure about the size / length of the file, for example, it may be 2 MB or 2000 MB so, do you think CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_RAW will help me?

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content:
Yeah, I believe so,

For testing purposes, You can also generate the hash values Sha-256 or md5 locally on the windows / mac terminal and see if it helps.

Fundamentally the ABAP fm also does the same takes the file as input and generate the value

entry.title: 🌐 Atenção, Comunidade SAP Salvador🌐
entry.content:
Temos uma notícia incrível para você! A Comunidade SAP Brasil agora tem um site oficial onde você pode acompanhar todos os eventos e ficar por dentro das últimas novidades do mundo SAP! 🚀✨

No nosso site, você encontrará:

  • Informações fornecidas sobre eventos e workshops 📅

  • Atualizações sobre as melhores práticas e tecnologias SAP 🔧

  • Notícias e artigos relevantes sobre o universo SAP 📰

  • Como participar da sua comunidade e interagir com outros membros 💬

Não perca tempo! Acesse agora o site oficial da Comunidade SAP Brasil e veja como você pode fazer parte dessa jornada incrível. Junte-se a nós e acompanhe tudo o que há de novo no mundo SAP!

🔗Acesse o site oficial e fique por dentro de tudo: 🌟 https://sitbrazil.com/

 

Vamos juntos fortalecer nossa comunidade e expandir nossos conhecimentos! 💪📈

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: OK, thank you, I will try with CALCULATE_HASH_FOR_RAW

entry.title: Re: How to Export/Import Role Based Permissions and Groups
entry.content: Currently it is not supported to export and import permission roles. There's already enhancement raised for this function: Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence .

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of Legacy org chart and Profile preview a...
entry.content:
Hi Mahwish,

Spotlight and profile preview (part of Latest People Profile) will become universal in 1H 2025 release. And Legacy People profile will be deleted on November 15, 2025. Hope this clarifies.

Regards,

Kayla

We have renewed the Secret ID in RBSC and tried creating another user; however, the issue still persists.

Upon checking SAP Note 0003387166, point number 2 indicates that we do not have an assigned license for SBPA or IRPA. I am unsure how to obtain this license.

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Please login to the Fiori launchpad site --> Click on the user icon --> Settings --> SAp Start Mobile Application --> Select register to scan the QR code related to this site 

Follow this guide https://help.sap.com/docs/build-work-zone-standard-edition/sap-build-work-zone-standard-edition/setting-up-sap-mobile-start-application

entry.title: Monitoring of NON SAP Systems
entry.content:
Dear Support,

 

Due to the end of the System Monitoring support in the Solution Manager, we are considering migrating to Focused Run, but we have the doubt of how we will be able to monitor all the NON SAP part from SAP Focused Run?

 

Thank you and best regards

PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Monitoring of NON SAP Systems
entry.content:
For System Monitoring in FRUN, we also have a group of supported products which could be monitored via FRUN:

3346141 - Supported Products in FRUN

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/frun-supported-products.html

System is not present in supported products list in above list, it may be possible to configure host monitoring for the host where the non-SAP is hosted. 

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-focused-run/expert-portal/frun-supported-products/frun-setup-stalo-host.html

However, if the non-SAP system does not present in supported products list, there's no standard template to monitor the system directly in FRUN.

One question about app Upload Material Inventory Price.

We want mass change special stock inventory price, if app Upload Material Inventory Price can support us do this. If yes , how should we modify the upload template. we try to add two column, one sales document ,the other is item(SD), But failed show us error.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content:
try this

select value into variable from table

entry.title: Re: From Application Logging to Cloud Logging: Service Innovation Guide
entry.content:
Hi @sreehari_vpillai , Many thanks for your prompt input and advice based your real time experience. We have followed the below sequence of steps and getting the error ""No SAP Cloud Logging credentials found" while deploying the application:

1. Created ups instance with parameter in other sub account :  cf cups myups -l https://<ingest-username>:<ingest-password>@<ingest-endpoint>/cfsyslog

2. Bind the user provided service (ups) instance with application in mta.yml. in that mta.yml, we  did not use any cls instance in  app and getting the above error. 

Regards,

Mohit Bansal

entry.title: Filter on Product Returns Unexpected Result in Sales Order
entry.content:
I discovered strange system behavior when adding a product and enter value in the Product fields, system gives proposed products unexpected.

for example, the Product is 326 - TEST Product. 

In the sales order, add a new item, in Product field enter IT, the drop down value help shows this product 326. Why it shows up here?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Filter on Product Returns Unexpected Result in Sales...
entry.content:
Dear requester,

In the product master data, the Product ID is 326, the description is maintained as TEST Product.

And the Product Category is 102 - IT Equipment.

the Product field in the sales order considers not only the product ID and description, it considers other product characters as well including product category.

Hence, when entering IT in the product filter, the product 326 shows up in the value help.

This is the designed system behavior.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: OpenID provider cannot process the request: redirect_uri does not match the configuration
entry.content:
Hello!

Following the tutorial https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-cf-security-xsuaa-create..html#89359a09-cfe1-406a-9787-8015221cf09a I arrived at step 9 and executed the second call:

But the system, insted of returning the no dara message, is returning the following error:

I found this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-cap-app-router-invalid-uri/qaq-p/12704587 and applied the accepted solution in xs-security.json file:

{
...
"oauth2-configuration": {
    "redirect-uris": [
        "http://*.localhost:4004/**",
        "https://*.hana.ondemand.com/**",
        "https://*.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/**"
    ]
}
}

 

Am I missing something? Bear in mind that I had to change the route to be unique inside the CF landscape. Other strange thing is That it does not consider auth key generation.

Please help! 

Regards,

Mig

entry.title: Re: How to handle variables in SQL based view - Data Sphere
entry.content: which value you want to add into those variables?

entry.title: Sabe a IA generativa da SAP? Então, é super top!
entry.content:
A IA generativa da SAP é uma tecnologia poderosa que cria conteúdo novinho em folha, tipo imagens, textos e até músicas, a partir de dados que já existem. Isso pode revolucionar vários aspectos dos negócios, desde criar campanhas de marketing personalizadas até otimizar processos operacionais.

Uma das ferramentas mais legais da SAP nessa área é o Joule, um copiloto de IA que junta vários agentes autônomos que colaboram entre si. Esses agentes ajudam as empresas a serem mais produtivas e a tomarem decisões mais inteligentes, conectando dados de várias fontes e oferecendo insights valiosos.

Além disso, a SAP tem o SAP AI Core e o SAP AI Launchpad, que são plataformas que permitem aos desenvolvedores criar, customizar e implementar soluções complexas baseadas em IA de forma eficiente e segura.

Curtiu? Tem alguma aplicação específica da IA generativa que você quer saber mais?

Vamos interagir! Comenta aí

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: my settings not have QR code. pls advise further

entry.title: Re: Automating China VAT Invoice Process
entry.content:
Hi @George_Chu, 

Thanks for your sharing, appreciate if could seek your assist in clarify the API endpoints below:

1. Is the "receiveInvoice" here, is to receive invoice from SAP's Incoming VAT Invoice Management to source system (e.g. Oracle), or it will fetch directly from China Golden Tax System to SAP, then to source system? 

2. When calling "declareInvoice" in the source system (e.g. oracle), is the Incoming VAT Invoices in SAP will be declare to Golden Tax System?

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start

entry.title: Re: I created the SAP GUI AI Agent
entry.content: Sure, I got bored waiting so if you want, add a pull request to https://github.com/mario-andreschak/mcp-sap-gui , if you like to share that SAP GUI Scripting implementation

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: @Virinchy how to access CFLP pls?

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: CFLP is the Central Fiori Launchpad where you access the tiles

entry.title: Re: OpenID provider cannot process the request: redirect_...
entry.content:
Solved!

As simple as update the XSUAA service instance configurarion in cloud foundry 🙂 based on changes made in xs-security.json, with the command: 

cf update-service xsuaa-service-tutorial -c security/xs-security.json

Hope this helps someone.

entry.title: Restrict delete access on custom Fiori app
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have enabled the 'Delete' button in a existing custom Fiori application using the following annotation in a CDS view:

 

@ObjectModel: { deleteEnabled: true }

This automatically added a radio button for each record in Fiori app. However, I had to implement a UI adaptation to allow users to select multiple records (switching from radio buttons to checkboxes) for deletion.

Currently, all users with access to the app can delete records. I need to know if it's possible to disable the 'Delete' button based on user roles or security permissions. We want to enable the delete functionality to only specific users.

What are some other ways I can achieve this restriction?

Thank you!

Rama

entry.title: Re: Issue with local annotations in sap bas

I have created the project with template type "Basic".

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: @Mandy2025 Manage Site is shown only for users that have "TENANT_ADMIN" role, please ensure you get the access to manage the site and enable the SAP Start to the site

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: Let me contact my admin to enable this. @Virinchy

entry.title: In SAP PS cn48n confirmation overview report can we have date parameters to select need details
Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content: i think 'TENANT_ADMIN' is old role name and Launchpad_Admin is the new one.

entry.title: SAP project system
entry.content: SAP project system I need date parameter for confirmation overview report in cn48n screen

entry.title: PPDS location created as suffix_01 & same location maintained as Business partner in TM
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

We are currently having a scenario where in the embedded TM system is already implemented and live in production environment. As a part of global implementation, we are now implementing the PPDS in S4. While integrating the production plants we encountered with below scenario, and we need your valuable inputs on how to proceed ahead.

Scenario:

  1. Plant which we want to use in PPDS is already created as business partner in embedded TM environment in S4.
  2. The solution for TM is live in Production
  3. We integrated the 1000 with location type 1001 into PPDS.
  4. It comes as 1000_01, this is observed via standard integration result in PPDS as 1000 (BP location type = 1021) is already used by TM as one time location

To address below points :

  1. Have we encountered this scenario before ?
  2. Does this work as standard behaviour for MD and TD on PPDS side ?
  3. Any challenges/implications/limitations we are aware of if we have done this in past?

Thanks

Debasis Nanda

entry.title: Re: CAP or RAP which model to choose?
entry.content:
Hello,

You can get the framework to decide which technology to use for your solution:

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/quocvuongho_choosing-the-right-technology-for-sap-btp-activity-7298246691332177920-1DjS?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAA5tWZIBwAMD1NI7O7kjUAbLI4_NCdvjHAg

Hope that help.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAC Broadcast Report Zip File
entry.content:
Hi @GeorgeBennett ,

No, SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) automatically zips emailed burst reports for security and compression reasons, and there is no standard option to send them as unzipped attachments.

However, here are some potential workarounds:

1.Manually Extract and Resend: The recipient can manually extract and forward the report as an unzipped attachment.
2.Use a File Repository: Store the report in a shared location (e.g., SAP Business Technology Platform, SharePoint, or Google Drive) and email a direct link instead of an attachment.

default email sender configured in the SAC tenant settings.

Kindly upvote.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Restrict delete access on custom Fiori app
entry.content:
Can you try with annotation @ui.DeleteHidden and apply it based on the security role

Please refer  'Visibility of the Delete and Create Buttons' section in  Fiori elements learning journey

or the 'Dynamic CRUD Restrictions' section in the Fiori elements showcase

entry.title: eInvoice (India) details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have implemented S4 HANA Public Cloud System. We have business requirement  to send invoice forms with eInvoice details (for India) like IRN number and QR code as soon as billing document is created through an email/SMS instantaneously to a customer. 

Once the invoice document, billing output generated instantly. If eInvoice is not triggered for it or eInvoice processing takes time, eInvoice details are missing from billing form.

Can you please let me know how to achieve this where as soon as billing document is created, email will be triggered to customer with eInvoice details without any delay and manual intervention.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure "standard text key" for task list &...
entry.content: i did not get this option in spro, i have searched it as well & i have checked authorization.

entry.title: Master Data Retrieval API for Procurement
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to retrieve master data using master data retrieval API for procurement and the results were not returning correctly. 

1. Using the Search endpoint (/entities/{entityName})- there are entities that are returning results for example, entity User will show the results but for CostCenter, Business Unit it just return one value. See screenshot. The count shows there are 537 but only one was returned. 

2. The MetaData endpoint returns the fields for CostCenter for example but when I used it as $select field, the error occurs. I tried using Name or UniqueName but error occurs. For other fields like TimeUpdate, TimeCreated and other custom fields it worked just fine. 

Error: 

 "errCode": "400 BAD_REQUEST",
    "errMessage": "The following fields are not valid in $select: [Name]"
 

MetaData Result: 

 

Let me know if you encountered the same issue and how you resolved it. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to combine multiple Purchase requisiti...
entry.content:
Hello,

I think you can explore the demand aggregation feature of SAP Ariba. The feature allows combining of PRs into one before generating a PO based on certain criteria you will define. 

Regards,

Mart

entry.title: Re: Integrating with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs using SAML Bearer Assertion
entry.content:
@gustavokath

HI, When calling an API, can I connect with a token without a separate Datasphere account? I would like to query data by calling an API from my Java system and accessing the odata URL.
Users who do not have an account in Datasphere must log in to receive the token. Does Datasphere require each account per user? Please tell me how to access odata data if I don't need it.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Beginner Steps in Advanced SAP TM - Milk Run Scenario
entry.content:
Hi,

How can I control the number of suppliers in 1 Freight order?

The requirement is, I can club only 4 suppliers in a single Freight order, more than 4 suppliers are nor allowed.

I tried using this feature as well in the Optimizer settings, but didn't work :

entry.title: Re: how to restrict serial numbers at plant level in ewm
entry.content:
Hi @Sachin87 ,

two plants (1000 and 2000) => is not different Org Structure ? I meant at least different stock type can fix your problem.

Different plant+ same storage  location => It is possible, at least stock type can distinguish which plant it came from/for... This is one way to restrict.

Above is my opinion, lets wait for Other Folks input .Please let me know if you have further questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: No data was released for version Y10 and Consolidation Unit - SAP Group Reporting
entry.content:
System shows this warning if there is no more data to release from ACDOCA to GR. Here, I see that you are doing a FULL release, yet you are not getting any data into Group Reporting.
1) Please check if you have any data for this period and Consolidation Unit in ACDOCA.
2) If you don't have data in ACDOCA, then the warning message is justified.
3) But, if you have data in ACDOCA, but still not getting any data into GR after Data Release, that means the Consolidation Related Fields (Cons Unit, FS Item, SubItem, Partner Unit etc.,) are not derived for these lines in ACDOCA. Please verify. If this is the case, then you first run Realignment job to have these Consolidation Related fields populated in ACDOCA. Then do a Data Release to Group Reporting.

entry.title: Local annotations are reflecting in sap smart controls
entry.content:

Below is the code in manifest.json file 

 

and below is the annotation code 

 

Even in the network tab the annotations file is getting loaded without any issue.

And when preview the application i dont see any columns in the smart table.

KR,

Anji

entry.title: Event Mesh activation in Integration Suite fails

I added Manage Business Events (Event Mesh) from Manage Capabilities in Integration Suite and activated it in Configure -> Event Mesh and it shows Failed.

Even if I Deactivate the Event Mesh and reactivate it, it still shows Failed.
Please let me know if you know the cause or how to solve this problem.

Best Regards,
KuroKen.

entry.title: Re: How to start using SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Dear @Mandy2025 ,

Kindly, with the administrator whether the SAP S4 HANA Public cloud and SAP Start is integrated through SAP BTP.

Check whether the below activation process is completed and all the data are correct as given in the below blog:https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/setting-up-sap-start-with-sap-s-4hana-cloud-public-edition/ba-p/13573816

Hope this helps!!!

Best Regards,
Surya.

entry.title: 💰 SAP Salaries in 2025: Europe vs. USA - Are You Earning Your Worth? 💰
entry.content:
Are you an SAP professional wondering how your compensation stacks up in today's dynamic market? In 2025, the demand for skilled SAP consultants continues to surge, making it a fantastic time to be in the field. However, the salary landscape varies significantly depending on your location. Let's dive into a comparative analysis of SAP salaries in Europe and the USA to see how they stack up!

Key Insights from our 2025 SAP Salary Snapshot:

  • 🌍 USA vs. Europe: Generally, SAP professionals in the USA tend to command higher salaries compared to their European counterparts. This remains a consistent trend in 2025.
  • 📈 Experience Matters: Experience is a major salary driver on both sides of the Atlantic. As you climb the career ladder to Senior and Lead roles, you can expect substantial increases in your earning potential in both Europe and the USA.
  • 🔥 High Demand Continues: The SAP ecosystem is thriving! The demand for experienced SAP consultants is robust across all modules and technologies in both Europe and the USA.

Factors Shaping SAP Salaries in 2025:

  • 🇪🇺 Europe: European SAP salaries are influenced by a mix of factors:
    • Cost of Living Variations: Salary levels reflect the diverse cost of living across different European countries.
    • Social Benefits & Packages: Robust social security and comprehensive benefits packages in many European nations can influence base salary expectations.
    • Multilingual Skills: In multilingual Europe, language skills can be a valuable asset and impact compensation.
  • 🇺🇸 USA: The US SAP market is characterized by:
    • High Market Demand: A strong and competitive market for top SAP talent drives salaries upwards.
    • Location-Based Variations: Major tech hubs in the USA often offer premium compensation packages to attract skilled professionals.

Are you getting paid what you deserve in the 2025 SAP market?

  • SAP Consultants: Take a moment to compare your current compensation against the salary ranges presented in our snapshot. Are you positioned competitively?
  • Hiring Managers: Ensure your salary offers are attractive and competitive to secure and retain top-tier SAP talent in this demanding market.
  • Aspiring SAP Professionals: Understanding the earning potential and career growth trajectory within the SAP ecosystem is crucial for planning your career path.

Let's Discuss! What are your thoughts on these SAP salary trends for 2025? Do these insights align with your experiences? Share your perspectives and questions in the comments below! 👇

#SAP #SAPSalaries #SAPCareers #Europe #USA #Compensation #TechSalaries #SAPConsultant #S4HANA #SAPFICO #SAPMM #SAPSD #CareerDevelopment #LinkedInLearning #2025Salaries

Important Note: Remember, these salary figures are estimates and can fluctuate based on various factors including your specific location, specialized skills, industry sector, and the size of the company. The averages provided are based on common SAP module areas like FI, MM, and SD, and may not fully reflect niche or highly specialized roles which can command even higher compensation.

📊 Key Takeaways: 📊

➡️ USA SAP salaries are generally higher than in Europe.

➡️ Experience is a significant factor impacting earning potential in both regions.

➡️ The demand for skilled SAP professionals remains strong across the SAP ecosystem.

🌍 Regional Factors Influencing Salaries: 🌍

🇪🇺 Europe: Cost of living variations, social benefits, and valuable language skills.

🇺🇸 USA: Higher market demand, strong competition, and location in major tech hubs.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_sap-sapsalaries-sapcareers-activity-7296155373273575424-x4It?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAJPDL8BjpJe3thZB6t04k7Z2hRVHhboAec

entry.title: 🚀 Salaires des Consultants SAP en France en 2025 : Êtes-vous rémunéré à votre juste valeur ? 🚀
entry.content:
🚀 Salaires des Consultants SAP en France en 2025 : Êtes-vous rémunéré à votre juste valeur ? 🚀

Êtes-vous un consultant SAP talentueux naviguant dans le paysage professionnel français ? Vous vous demandez si votre salaire reflète véritablement votre expertise et la demande du marché ? En ce début d'année 2025, une chose est claire : le marché SAP en France reste extrêmement dynamique, et vos compétences sont plus précieuses que jamais ! Plongeons ensemble au cœur des tendances salariales pour les consultants SAP en France, en explorant les fourchettes de rémunération, les facteurs clés et les perspectives d'évolution, que vous soyez un profil junior ambitieux ou un expert multi-modules chevronné.

Ce qu'il faut retenir de notre analyse des salaires SAP en 2025 :

  • 📈 L'expérience, ça compte ! C'est une constante dans le monde SAP, et cela se confirme en 2025 : l'expérience est le principal moteur de votre salaire. Notre analyse révèle une progression salariale significative à chaque étape de votre carrière, du junior fraîchement diplômé à l'expert fort de nombreuses années de projets complexes. Cette valorisation de l'expérience souligne l'importance cruciale de l'apprentissage continu et du développement de vos compétences dans un écosystème SAP en constante évolution.

  • 🔥 Forte demande : Un marché français toujours aussi dynamique. Bonne nouvelle pour les professionnels SAP : le marché français du conseil SAP se maintient à un niveau élevé d'activité. La transformation digitale des entreprises françaises, accélérée par les enjeux de compétitivité et d'innovation, alimente une demande soutenue pour des profils SAP qualifiés. Plus particulièrement, l'expertise sur SAP S/4HANA, la suite ERP de nouvelle génération de SAP, est particulièrement recherchée et valorisée par les employeurs. Si vous êtes un expert S/4HANA, votre profil est assurément "hot" sur le marché !

  • 🎯 Spécialisation = valorisation : Devenez un expert recherché. Dans un marché SAP mature, la spécialisation est devenue un atout majeur pour optimiser votre rémunération. Les consultants SAP experts dans des modules spécifiques (Finance et Contrôle de Gestion - FI/CO, Gestion des Matériaux - MM, Ventes et Distribution - SD, Planification de la Production - PP, et bien d'autres) sont particulièrement courtisés par les entreprises. De même, les profils possédant une expertise multi-modules, capables de naviguer avec aisance entre différentes composantes de l'écosystème SAP, peuvent prétendre aux rémunérations les plus attractives. Investir dans le développement d'une expertise pointue est donc une stratégie payante pour booster votre carrière et votre salaire.

Quels facteurs influencent concrètement les salaires SAP en France ?

  • 📍 Localisation géographique : Paris et les métropoles en tête. Comme dans de nombreux secteurs, la localisation géographique joue un rôle non négligeable sur les salaires SAP en France. La région parisienne, cœur économique du pays, et les grandes métropoles régionales (Lyon, Lille, Marseille, Bordeaux, Nantes, etc.) offrent généralement des salaires plus élevés. Cela s'explique par un coût de la vie plus important dans ces zones urbaines, mais aussi par une plus forte concentration d'entreprises utilisatrices de SAP et de cabinets de conseil. Si vous êtes mobile géographiquement, n'hésitez pas à explorer les opportunités dans ces régions dynamiques.

  • 💼 Type d'employeur : ESN, Cabinets de Conseil ou Client Final ? Le type d'employeur pour lequel vous travaillez peut également impacter votre niveau de rémunération. On observe généralement des grilles salariales différentes entre les ESN (Entreprises de Services Numériques), les cabinets de conseil en management et en SI, et les clients finaux (entreprises utilisatrices de SAP). Chaque type de structure offre des avantages et des inconvénients en termes de salaire, de missions, et de perspectives de carrière. Il est important de bien comprendre ces différences pour faire le choix qui correspond le mieux à vos aspirations.

  • 🗣️ Compétences linguistiques : L'anglais, et au-delà ! Dans un contexte économique globalisé, la maîtrise de l'anglais est devenue un prérequis pour la plupart des consultants SAP en France. Cependant, dans un marché de plus en plus international, la connaissance d'autres langues étrangères (allemand, espagnol, etc.) peut devenir un véritable atout et impacter positivement votre rémunération. La capacité à évoluer dans des contextes multiculturels et à communiquer avec des équipes internationales est de plus en plus valorisée.

Consultant SAP en France : Êtes-vous payé à votre juste valeur en 2025 ?

Il est temps de faire le point sur votre situation personnelle ! Comparez votre salaire actuel aux fourchettes de rémunération présentées dans notre analyse. N'hésitez pas à échanger avec votre manager sur votre évolution salariale et les perspectives de progression.

  • Managers : Pour attirer et fidéliser les meilleurs talents SAP, assurez-vous de proposer des rémunérations compétitives et des packages attractifs (avantages sociaux, formation, mobilité...). Un consultant SAP épanoui est un atout précieux pour la performance de votre entreprise !

  • Jeunes diplômés et consultants en devenir : L'écosystème SAP en France offre de réelles opportunités de carrière et de progression salariale. Visualisez votre potentiel d'évolution et investissez dans le développement de vos compétences pour atteindre vos objectifs !

N'hésitez pas à partager votre expérience et vos insights sur les salaires SAP en France en commentaires ! Échangeons ensemble sur les tendances du marché et les meilleures stratégies pour optimiser votre rémunération ! 👇

#SAP #SalairesSAP #ConsultantSAP #France #MarchéDuTravail #Rémunération #S4HANA #SAPFICO #SAPMM #SAPSD #CarrièreIT #ConseilSAP #LinkedInLearning #Salaires2025 #FrenchTech #EcosystèmeSAP

📊 Points Clés à Retenir : 📊

➡️ L'expérience demeure le facteur clé de progression salariale dans le domaine SAP.

➡️ La demande pour les consultants SAP qualifiés reste forte et soutenue en France.

➡️ Les salaires varient significativement en fonction de l'expertise et de la spécialisation, notamment sur S/4HANA et les modules recherchés.

🇫🇷 Facteurs Régionaux Influant sur les Salaires en France : 🇫🇷

  • 📍 Région Parisienne & grandes métropoles : Salaires généralement plus élevés en raison du coût de la vie et de la concentration des entreprises.
  • 💼 Type d'entreprise : Les ESN, Cabinets de Conseil, et Clients finaux peuvent proposer des grilles salariales variables.
  • 🗣️ Compétences linguistiques : La maîtrise de l'anglais et d'autres langues étrangères constitue un atout valorisé.

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_sap-salairessap-consultantsap-activity-7296156960125583362-ajrg?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAJPDL8BjpJe3thZB6t04k7Z2hRVHhboAec

entry.title: Level Up Your SAP Retail Finance Skills! 🚀 Join our Immersive Bootcamp
entry.content:
Are you ready to supercharge your SAP Finance expertise and become a sought-after professional in the dynamic Retail industry? The retail sector is undergoing massive transformation, and skilled SAP Finance experts are crucial for navigating this change and driving success.

That's why we're thrilled to announce our SAP Retail Bootcamp: Finance Overview - your fast track to mastering key financial processes in SAP S/4HANA specifically tailored for retail businesses!

Join us for two intensive days in the beautiful city of Rouen, Normandy, France, packed with practical knowledge, hands-on insights, and expert guidance. This bootcamp is meticulously designed to elevate your SAP Finance skillset and propel your career forward in the exciting world of retail.

Day 1: Building Your Rock-Solid Foundation in SAP Retail Finance

On Day 1, we'll lay the groundwork, focusing on the fundamental building blocks of SAP Retail Finance. You'll gain a deep understanding of the essential organizational structures and core financial accounting processes within a retail context:

  • 🏢 Financial Organizational Units in SAP: Retail Edition: Go beyond the basics and truly understand the nuances of financial organizational units within SAP, specifically as they apply to retail scenarios. We'll explore Company Codes, Controlling Areas, and other critical elements, illustrating how they are structured and utilized in retail businesses with examples and practical exercises. You'll learn how to configure these units to accurately reflect the complex structures of modern retail organizations, from brick-and-mortar stores to e-commerce platforms.

  • 📒 General Ledger (FI-GL): The Retail Finance Heartbeat: Dive into the core of financial accounting in SAP - the General Ledger (FI-GL). We'll explore its retail-specific configurations, chart of accounts adaptations for retail, and how to manage the high volume of transactions characteristic of the retail sector. You'll learn best practices for setting up and utilizing FI-GL to ensure accurate and compliant financial record-keeping in a retail environment.

  • 📈 Profit Centers and Hierarchy: Mastering Retail Profitability Analysis: Profitability is king in retail! This session will equip you with the knowledge to effectively manage and analyze profitability across diverse retail segments and store locations using Profit Centers and Hierarchies. Learn how to configure profit center accounting to track performance by store, product category, region, or any dimension relevant to your retail business. You'll gain practical skills in interpreting profit center data to drive strategic decision-making.

  • 🧾 Accounts Payable (FI-AP): Streamlining Retail Procurement: Efficient vendor invoice processing and payment management are absolutely critical for retail procurement. We'll delve into Accounts Payable (FI-AP), focusing on retail-specific scenarios like handling high volumes of vendor invoices, managing complex payment terms, and optimizing procurement processes. You'll master the techniques to streamline your retail AP processes within SAP, ensuring timely payments and strong vendor relationships.

Day 2: Deep Dive into Retail Finance Operations and Reporting for Strategic Insights

Day 2 takes your expertise to the next level, focusing on core retail finance operations and leveraging SAP S/4HANA for insightful reporting:

  • 💰 Accounts Receivable (FI-AR): Optimizing Retail Sales and Cash Flow: In the fast-paced retail world, efficient customer invoicing and payment processes are essential for healthy cash flow. We'll explore Accounts Receivable (FI-AR) in a retail context, covering topics like managing diverse payment methods, handling high sales volumes, and optimizing processes for both B2C and B2B retail scenarios. You'll learn how to leverage FI-AR to improve your retail sales operations and accelerate cash collection.

  • 📊 Material Costing (CO-PC): Unlocking Retail Article Profitability: Understanding the true cost of retail articles is paramount for pricing strategies and profitability management. This session will uncover the intricacies of Material Costing (CO-PC) in a retail context. We'll explore valuation methods specific to retail inventory, learn how to manage costing for diverse retail articles, and understand the integration between costing and inventory management. You'll gain the skills to analyze retail article costs and contribute to informed pricing and profitability decisions.

  • 🗓️ Period-End Closing (FI/CO): Ensuring Financial Accuracy in Retail: Mastering Period-End Closing processes in FI/CO is crucial for accurate financial reporting. This session will guide you through the essential steps for month-end and year-end closing specifically within SAP Retail Finance. We'll cover retail-specific closing tasks, reconciliation best practices, and how to ensure timely and accurate financial statements for your retail business.

  • 📈 Financial Reporting: Data-Driven Decisions in Retail: The power of SAP S/4HANA lies in its ability to generate insightful financial reports. This final session will focus on how to leverage SAP S/4HANA to create reports tailored for retail analysis and strategic decision-making. You'll discover how to extract key retail KPIs, build custom reports, and utilize SAP's reporting tools to gain actionable insights from your financial data, empowering data-driven decisions in your retail organization.

Why Attend This Immersive SAP Retail Finance Bootcamp?

  • Hands-on, Practical Learning: This isn't just theory! Our bootcamp is designed for practical application. You'll gain real-world skills and techniques that you can immediately implement in your SAP Retail Finance role, making you more effective and valuable from day one.
  • Expert-Led Sessions: Learn directly from experienced SAP consultants who possess deep knowledge of both SAP Finance and the Retail industry. Benefit from their real-world project experience, best practices, and practical tips and tricks.
  • Boost Your Career Trajectory: In today's competitive job market, specialized skills are in high demand. By enhancing your SAP Finance skillset with a retail focus, you'll become a highly sought-after retail finance expert, opening doors to exciting career opportunities and advancement.
  • Valuable Networking Opportunities: Connect and collaborate with fellow SAP professionals who are also passionate about the retail space. Expand your professional network, share experiences, and build valuable connections within the SAP retail community in Rouen, Normandy, France.

Don't miss this exceptional opportunity to accelerate your SAP Retail Finance journey! Spaces are limited for this immersive bootcamp in Rouen, Normandy, France.

Register today and take the next step towards becoming a leading SAP Retail Finance expert!

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/mickaelquesnot_gusap-retail-bootcampfinance-overviewpptx-activity-7296588636093833216-NyPk?utm_source=share&utm_medium=member_desktop&rcm=ACoAAAJPDL8BjpJe3thZB6t04k7Z2hRVHhboAec

 

#SAPRetail #SAPFinance #Bootcamp #Retail #Finance #SAPS4HANA #CareerDevelopment #SAPTraining #RetailIndustry #FinancialAccounting #Controlling #CareerBoost #Rouen #Normandy #France

entry.title: Re: eInvoice (India) details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Did you already look for online documentation such as SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - India - Sales - Order and Contract Management - Billing - Invoice Reference Number Capturing

Check following apps 

  • Maintain Form Template to download the pre delivered standard forms
  • Install Additional Software  to customize it with the Adobe LiveCycle Designer (ALCD) should be free (?)

entry.title: Sales order to sales order copy controls VTAA
entry.content:
As per the business requirement while the creating a sales order with reference to another sales order the request delivery date and pricing date should not be copy from the reference document, it should be the present date.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sales order to sales order copy controls VTAA
entry.content:
Hello,
 
The requested delivery date VBAK-VDATU is taken over in General header data copy control routine 051 (FV45C051).
The pricing date (VBKD-PRSDT) is taken over in Item Business Data copy control routine 102 (FV45C102).
 
To change the standard behavior you need to create a copy of the above mentioned routines and modify the logic to avoid copying the fields that you do not want to take from the reference document. Then assign the custom routines in transaction VTAA.

Best regards,
Edina
SAP

entry.title: Re: Issue with Loading/Creating Story Reports in Non-Prod...
entry.content:
Dear All,

I have encountered the same earlier, now its been resolved; Look for the below workarounds.

1. Kindly Enable 3rd party cookies in any browser first, clear the cache and history - Should work most of the times. 

2. Check with your IT Team or Integrations Team - Ask them to check the provisioning logs, it should be all passed, even there is one user which has FAILED, your stories wont work. 

 

Regards
Ajay Kulkarni

entry.title: What are the cases where homogenous graph and heterogenous graph should be used ?
entry.content:

Is there a performance difference in using homogenous and heterogenous graphs .

Any sample use cases for homogenous and heterogenous graphs would be very helpful.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to Configure "standard text key" for task list &...
entry.content:
Did you already try those two paths from online documentation?

  • In Customizing by choosing Quality Management  Quality Planning  Inspection Planning  Operation   Work Center  Maintain Standard Text Keys.
  • In the application by choosing Logistics  Plant maintenance  Planned maintenance  Maintenance task lists  Extras  Standard text.

entry.title: Re: Create an alert for one pay component recurring

Arun

entry.title: BADI not found in Delivery note item level
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Recently am working in delivery note form, where we need to convert item delivered into some quantities, I have explored all badi available in public cloud for delivery item. I have checked using custom tracing, no badi is triggering .while executing "display outbound delivery" . Can you suggest if any BADI available for item level in outbound delivery.

Please note, I have added BADI for header level.(LE_SHP_MODIFY_HEAD)

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: How can we view the status of the database and backup status in Grow with SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to check the database size, database version, and backup status, but we are unable to find any Fiori app to retrieve this information. Could you please suggest how we can view the database status?
